name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools churn out visually bland, templated slides that look machine-made and undermine credibility. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between speed and quality by letting teams generate structured, visually refined presentations without sacrificing a professional look. It saves hours of manual design work while keeping output genuinely presentation-ready.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks quickly without hiring a designer
Creating client-facing proposals that look custom rather than AI-generated
Producing internal strategy or roadmap presentations at scale
Turning raw notes or briefs into structured slide narratives for sales or marketing teams
